metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_890
metadata.comment: Rationale: Profilin-1 is detected in the the presynapse of rat hippocampus CA1 [Fig3D] and cerebellar cortex [Fig4B & C] as well as the spine in CA1 [Fig3B-D]. The presentence profilin-1 at both the pre- and postsynaptic side was also observed in cultured mouse hippocampal neurons [Fig 5A-C]. The localisation of the immuno-gold label are consistent with the role of profilins as actin regulators.. Experimental description: Figure 3 and 4 is rat tissue "Adult albino rats (Wistar) were deeply anaesthetized with ketamine (100 mg / kg) and xylazine (5 mg / kg) and perfused through the left ventricle", Figure 5 is mouse cultured neurons "Primary cultures of hippocampal neurons were prepared from C57Bl6J mice at postnatal days 0-1 as described previously" found in the material and methods

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
